home.title: Welcome to Trip Manager
home.subtitle: Plan your perfect trip! Request customized travel packages and get personalized quotations from our team.
home.accountPrompt: Create an account to start requesting trips
home.requestTripsDesc: Tell us your destination, dates, and preferences
home.getQuotationsDesc: Receive personalized quotes from our travel experts
home.bookTravelDesc: Accept your quote and start your adventure

landing.heroSubtitle: Trip Manager helps transport companies handle customer transfer requests, send professional quotations, and confirm bookings — all in one place, with zero friction.
landing.featuresSubtitle: From the first quote request to the final confirmation — fully covered.
landing.feature1Desc: Customers submit transfer requests directly through your branded booking portal — no account required.
landing.feature2Desc: Draft, review, and send quotes with pricing, car seat info, and custom terms. Customers accept or reject in one click.
landing.feature3Desc: Admins get notified on every new request. Customers are emailed when their quote is ready or their booking is confirmed.
landing.feature4Desc: Chat directly with customers inside each request. No more lost emails or WhatsApp threads.
landing.feature5Desc: Available in English, Italian, German, and French. Serve international customers effortlessly.
landing.feature6Desc: Run multiple brands or companies from a single platform. Each has its own portal, admins, and requests.
landing.stepsSubtitle: A simple, fast flow from request to confirmed transfer.
landing.step1Desc: They fill in pickup, destination, passenger details and submit — getting a unique link to track their request.
landing.step2Desc: Review the request, create a quotation with pricing and extras, and send it to the customer with one click.
landing.step3Desc: The customer accepts, provides pickup details, and you confirm. Everyone gets notified automatically.
landing.ctaBannerSubtitle: Sign in to your account and start managing requests in minutes.

tripRequest.pickupPlaceholder: Street, city or place (e.g. Via Roma 1, Milan)
tripRequest.destinationPlaceholder: Street, city or place (e.g. Malpensa Airport)
tripRequest.specialRequestsPlaceholder: Any special requests or additional information...
tripRequest.flightDetailsNote: * Pickup details (date, time, flight number) can be added later after you receive and accept a quotation.
tripRequest.helpAlertBody:
In order to be able to formulate a correct and convenient quote, it is advisable to communicate the date of arrival and/or departure.

The transfer is considered confirmed when the customer receives notification of the reservation (booking confirmation).

Thank you!
